posts.author: Ms. Brennan
posts.title: Essay deadlines this term
posts.body: All Year 11 essays on Of Mice and Men are due by 17 October. Please submit via the portal.

posts.author: Mr. Singh
posts.title: Python project kick-off
posts.body: We begin our terminal-based game project this Friday. Bring a USB stick or ensure your GitHub account is set up.

posts.author: Alice Patel
posts.title: Study group – Maths
posts.body: Starting a Saturday maths study group in the library, 10am–12pm. Message me if interested.

posts.author: Dr. Okafor
posts.title: Lab safety reminder
posts.body: All students must wear goggles and lab coats in Lab 2. No exceptions from this term onwards.

posts.author: Grace Liu
posts.title: Lost: purple calculator
posts.body: Left a purple Casio calculator in Room 4 on Monday. Please hand to reception if found. Thanks!
